title: Kragujevac, Šumadija — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kragujevac, Šumadija: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kragujevac is a city in Šumadija with a population of 179,000. An industrial city in central Serbia, historically the first capital of modern Serbia and home to the Zastava automotive plant.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
